symposium entitled ‘National Science Day Symposium (NSDS-22)’ at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, in association with Himachal Pradesh Council for Science Technology and National Mathematics Day (NMD-2021): 22.12.2021 Virtual symposium entitled ‘National Mathematics Day (NMD-2021)’ at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, in association with Himachal Pradesh Council for Science Technology and Environment (HIMCOSTE), Government of Himachal Pradesh India on 22th Dec 2021.
